summary: Iteration 322: Sovereign Circle Master Module - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend REST APIs (create room, list rooms, get room) work correctly. WebSocket connection tested and working (ping/pong, peer_count). Frontend lobby loads with 'Live Sessions' title, Rapid City default node, Create/Join sections. Session screen shows HOST controls (7 color buttons, 9 solfeggio frequency buttons), orbital canvas with HOST badge, room code copy button, audio toggle, share moment button, and leave button. Regression tests passed for Auth login, Light Therapy (7 colors), Herbology (12 herbs), and Breathing (6 patterns).

issues: WebSocket shows 'Connecting...' briefly before switching to 'Connected' - this is expected behavior but could show a loading indicator

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 REST API tests passed, WebSocket manually verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test rooms via API during testing (auto-cleaned when no peers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sovereign Circle feature fully tested. Key data-testids: sovereign-lobby, sovereign-create-btn, sovereign-session, sovereign-host-controls, host-color-{hex}, host-freq-{hz}, sovereign-orbital-canvas, sovereign-leave-btn, sovereign-audio-toggle, sovereign-copy-code, sovereign-share-moment. Room ID format: sc_XXXXXXXX. WebSocket endpoint: /api/ws/sovereign-circle?room={id}&peer={id}. Default node is Rapid City (44.0805°N, 103.2310°W). Rooms auto-delete when all peers disconnect.
